title: Wb2UCI
text: Home * Software * Utilities * Wb2UCI Wb2UCI , (Wb2Uci, WB2UCI) a protocol adapter by Odd Gunnar Malin to run WinBoard Engines using the Chess Engine Communication Protocol under chess GUIs supporting UCI , such as the Shredder GUI . Wb2UCI is a console application running under Windows . Along with the executable Wb2Uci.exe , one must place a Wb2Uci.eng textfile into the engine folder [1] [2] . Contents 1 Wb2Uci.eng 2 Engines 3 GUIs 4 See also 5 Postings 5.1 2001 ... 5.2 2005 ... 5.3 2010 ... 5.4 2015 ... 6 External Links 7 References Wb2Uci.eng [ edit ] The Wb2Uci.eng file consists of following mandatory attribute–value pairs [3] , and many more optional. ;--------------------------- [ENGINE] Name=Name of engine Author=Name of engine author Filename=Wb2Uci.exe [OPTIONS] Program=engine.exe ;--------------------------- Engines [ edit ] WinBoard Engines GUIs [ edit ] UCI compatible GUIs See also [ edit ] Chess Engine Communication Protocol InBetween PolyGlot UCI UCI2WB WinBoard Postings [ edit ] 2001 ...
